emailText:
Hi there,

I came across the Plougastel-Daoulas Restaurant website and wanted to share some honest observations based on a quick audit. No pitch - just a fresh pair of eyes.

========================================
Website Health Check - Score: 68/100
========================================

5 issues identified:

HIGH
--------------------
- 5 HTTP images
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- No H1 tag
 HIGH
--------------------
- No schema markup
 HIGH
--------------------
- 2 broken navigation links
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- Missing social media links


WHAT'S WORKING WELL
--------------------
+ Business is established and operational
+ Has independent web presence
+ Active in local market

========================================

Your current website provider should be flagging things like this for you.

If you ever need a fresh pair of eyes or a new provider, just reach out.

Best,
David
DS Studios

issues.label: 5 HTTP images
issues.siteHint: This issue may affect user experience or rankings.

issues.label: No H1 tag
issues.siteHint: This issue may affect user experience or rankings.

issues.detail: Missing structured data helps Google display rich snippets in search results.
issues.label: No schema markup
issues.check: Search for your business on Google - do you see star ratings, hours, or FAQ entries?
issues.siteHint: Competitors with rich snippets get 3x more clicks.

issues.detail: Some main navigation links point to non-existent pages.
issues.label: 2 broken navigation links
issues.check: Hover over each navigation link and check the URL path. Click the ones that seem broken.
issues.siteHint: Broken navigation frustrates users and signals poor maintenance.

issues.label: Missing social media links
issues.siteHint: This issue may affect user experience or rankings.
